diagrams.title: Gradient Vector and Level Curves
diagrams.description: Shows gradient ∇f perpendicular to level curves, pointing in steepest ascent direction
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that gradient is always orthogonal to level curves and points uphill

diagrams.title: Classification of Critical Points
diagrams.description: Three scenarios: local minimum (bowl), local maximum (inverted bowl), saddle point
diagrams.purpose: Understand geometric interpretation of Hessian at critical points for classification

diagrams.title: Lagrange Multiplier Geometry
diagrams.description: Constraint curve with objective function contours, showing where gradients are parallel
diagrams.purpose: Visualize geometric interpretation: optimum occurs where constraint is tangent to objective contours

diagrams.title: Directional Derivive Interpretation
diagrams.description: Shows function surface with a specific direction vector and corresponding rate of change
elements: Tangent line showing rate of change
diagrams.purpose: Understand how directional derivative measures rate of change in any direction
